---
title: "Research"
---

## Working Papers

Add current working papers here.

For each paper, use this format:

**Paper Title**  
with Coauthor Name  
Status or short description.  
[PDF](#) | [SSRN](#) | [Code](#) | [Slides](#)

## Publications

Add published papers here, grouped either by year or by topic.

## Research Areas

- Asset pricing
- Crypto and blockchain markets
- Macro-finance
- Financial intermediation
- AI and financial markets, if this becomes a stable public research line
